lean_declaration:
theorem fps_onePlusX_pow_int {F : Type*} [Field F] [BinomialRing F] (n : ℕ) :
    ((1 + PowerSeries.X : PowerSeries F)⁻¹) ^ n =
      PowerSeries.mk fun k => (Ring.choose (-(n : ℤ)) k : F) :=
  fps_onePlusX_pow_neg' n
notes: Narrowed to negative integer exponent case as supported by context; uses existing helper theorem.
